title: Comment from Allina Health, HHS-ONC-2025-0005, HHS-ONC-2025-0005-0001, 2025-23896
comment_text:
Dear Dr. Keane:

On behalf of Allina Health, the attached letter is in response to the request for comments on the Assistant Secretary for Technology Policy/Office of the National Coordinator for Health Information Technology (ASTP/ONC) Deregulatory Actions To Unleash Prosperity proposed rule.

Please see the attached document for the entirety of our comments.
